original_image_tags: The back of a weathered, pale green or grey document page, likely a file folder or backing sheet. It has two hole-punch marks at the top. There are several faded, reversed ink stamps and some faint, illegible text visible through the paper from the other side.

elements.description: Page appears to be the back of a document showing faint, illegible bleed-through text. There is an upside-down blue stamp in the lower right area reading 'FEB 21 11 20 AM '50', 'RECEIVED-MAIL ROOM', 'FBI', and 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Above this is an upside-down purple rectangular stamp reading 'FEB 8 F 1950' with illegible surrounding text. In the upper right corner is an upside-down stamp reading 'INDEXED - FBI', 'RECORDED - FBI'.
